entries.content: Kelly successfully planned a summer office party with a Golden Hour Garden Party theme, featuring fairy lights, a grazing table, and a curated playlist (Beyoncé, Doja Cat, Destiny's Child) avoiding classic rock
Kelly prefers modern, trendy aesthetic for events (elevated casual, Pinterest-inspired) and strongly dislikes classic rock/2009 iPod shuffle playlists for gatherings
Ryan once made Kelly a good playlist that she appreciated, though he noted it wasn't made specifically for her, which hurt her feelings
